title: BUILDING INFORMATION MODELLING (BIM) TECHNICIAN
description:
• Prepare and produce drawings and as-built drawings including BIM models in accordance with project requirements.
  •   Develop and maintain BIM models throughout the project lifecycle until as-built stage.
  •   Perform system design and basic engineering calculations for assigned projects.
  •   Prepare and develop shop drawings according to project schedule and coordination requirements.
  •   Responsible for document control and management of drawings and submission documents.
  •   Maintain proper records of design changes ensure documentation are updated accordingly.
  •   Draft, amend and update drawings using AutoCAD and BIM software based on project requirements.
  •   Convert conceptual and design information into accurate and detailed construction drawings.
  •   Coordinate and collaborate with internal departments, consultants, contractors and external parties on design and model changes.
  •   Ensure BIM models comply with project BIM Execution Plan (BEP), standards and workflow requirements.
  •   Carry out proper drafting procedures for various project stages, including authority submissions.
  •   Perform quality control checks on drawings and BIM models to ensure accuracy, completeness and compliance before submission.
  •   Incorporate feedback and comments from engineers, architects, consultants and clients into drawings and models.
  •   Attend coordination meetings when required.

Job Requirement:

  •   Degree in Architecture or equivalent qualification.
  •   Minimum 2 years of relevant working experience in the related field.
  •   Proficient in BIM software including Revit, AutoCAD, SketchUp and other relevant drafting tools.
  •   Formal training and certification in BIM, AutoCAD or equivalent modelling software will be an advantage.
  •   Strong coordination and communication skills with the ability to work effectively.
  •   Able to multitask and perform in a fast-paced working environment.
  •   Possess strong analytical skills and able to work independently with minimal supervision.
  •   Good interpersonal and verbal communication skills.
  •   Willing to attend to urgent project requirements beyond normal office hours when necessary.
  •   Undertake any other duties assigned by management from time to time.
  • 5-day work week.

We are regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
